author: sleepyhauru
description: Add saved media for the bot to directly upload similar to alias.
end_user_data_statement:
This cog stores attachements uploaded by users for the purposes of creating custom commands to send uploaded attachments.
Users may delete their own data with or without making a data request.
install_msg: This cog will create folders to save and delete uploaded media locally. `[p]addimage` to add media to the guild. Owner can add global bot media.
name: AddImage
short: Add saved media for direct upload per guild and globally.
